text.title: Requirements Validation and Sign-Off Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the requirements-validation methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Pre-baseline pack VP-2026Q2 → 10-attribute score → segmented review across 3 sessions per functional area → dissent log clean → Sponsor sign-off; lifecycle moves to baseline.
